code: import{array,boolean,number,object,string}from'yup';export function objectSchema(fields){return object(fields).defined().noUnknown().nullable(false);}export function arraySchema(schema){return array(schema).defined().ensure();}export function stringSchema(){return string().defined().ensure();}export function numberSchema(){return number().defined().default(null);}export function booleanSchema(){return boolean().defined().default(false);}
